sub_modules.fp_fir_history_update: Combinational sample history shifter with implicit zero-filled reset state held by the top module.
sub_modules.fp_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM for the exact 101 binary32 FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.fp_fir_mac: Combinational binary32 FIR multiply-accumulate model using the coefficient set and current sample window.
sub_modules.fp_fir_output_select: Combinational output value selector for valid input cycles.
